---
title: "Premature Closures"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML, display

_candidates = [Path("quarto-data/premature-closures.json"), Path("../quarto-data/premature-closures.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "quarto-data/premature-closures.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report premature-closures"
    )

d        = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group    = d["group"]
findings = d["findings"]
total    = d["total"]
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
<p>A <strong>premature closure</strong> is a closed Epic or Capability that still has open
child epics or open linked issues. Either reopen the parent to reflect in-flight work, or
close and reassign the remaining items.</p>
""")
```

```{python}
if not findings:
    display(HTML("<p>✅ No premature closures found — all closed epics have fully closed descendants.</p>"))
else:
    html = f"<p><strong>{total} closed epic(s) with open work remaining.</strong></p>"

    for etype in ("Epic", "Capability"):
        rows = [f for f in findings if f["type"] == etype]
        if not rows:
            continue
        icon   = "🏆" if etype == "Epic" else "🧩"
        plural = "Epics" if etype == "Epic" else "Capabilities"
        html  += f"<h2>{icon} Closed {plural} with Open Work ({len(rows)})</h2>"

        for f in sorted(rows, key=lambda x: x["title"]):
            link        = f'<a href="{f["url"]}" target="_blank">{f["icon"]} {f["title"]}</a>' if f["url"] else f'{f["icon"]} {f["title"]}'
            child_note  = f'⚠️ {len(f["open_children"])} open child epic(s)' if f["open_children"] else ""
            issue_note  = f'⚠️ {len(f["open_issues"])} open issue(s)' if f["open_issues"] else ""
            notes       = " · ".join(x for x in (child_note, issue_note) if x)
            html       += f"<h3>{link} — {notes}</h3>"

            if f["open_children"]:
                html += "<p><strong>Open child epics:</strong></p>"
                html += '<table class="table table-sm"><thead><tr><th>Title</th><th>PI</th></tr></thead><tbody>'
                for c in f["open_children"]:
                    clink = f'<a href="{c["url"]}" target="_blank">{c["icon"]} {c["title"]}</a>' if c["url"] else f'{c["icon"]} {c["title"]}'
                    html += f"<tr><td>{clink}</td><td>{c['piid']}</td></tr>"
                html += "</tbody></table>"

            if f["open_issues"]:
                html += "<p><strong>Open linked issues:</strong></p>"
                html += '<table class="table table-sm"><thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Issue</th><th>Assignees</th></tr></thead><tbody>'
                for i in f["open_issues"]:
                    ilink     = f'<a href="{i["url"]}" target="_blank">{i["title"]}</a>' if i["url"] else i["title"]
                    assignees = ", ".join(i["assignees"]) if i["assignees"] else "<em>Unassigned</em>"
                    html     += f"<tr><td>#{i['iid']}</td><td>{ilink}</td><td>{assignees}</td></tr>"
                html += "</tbody></table>"

    display(HTML(html))
```
